expectations.evidence: CSS uses --_chip-* intermediate variables (13 total) on .chip root, following the same pattern as Button/Avatar
All intermediates map to --Primary-* with legacy fallbacks: e.g. --_chip-fg-bold: var(--Primary-FG-Bold, var(--Surface-Bold))
.filled, .tinted, .outlined variants all correctly consume intermediates with appropriate token usage
.appearanceNeutral and .appearanceNegative classes remap all 13 intermediate variables
Explanation covers intermediate variable pattern, CSS cascade, bold inversion, and per-variant behavior table
Header states 'ALL styling uses design tokens ONLY' and all values use var() references. One instance of literal 'normal' for letter-spacing which is acceptable.
